description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a dynamic combination of blue, neon green, black, gray, and white colors. The upper is primarily blue with black and gray overlays, accented by a bold neon green swoosh-like design on the side and a matching neon green outsole. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue for comfort, and white laces in a standard criss-cross pattern. The midsole is thick and sculpted, providing both cushioning and a modern, chunky aesthetic. The overall design suggests a focus on both style and performance, suitable for urban environments and active use.
description: A stylish high-top sneaker with blue, neon green, black, and gray panels, featuring a chunky neon green sole and white criss-cross laces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue upper, neon green swoosh, and thick neon green sole with gray and black overlays.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white criss-cross laces, blue toe box, and the prominent neon green sole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar color blocking, visible neon green swoosh, and sculpted sole details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the gray and blue heel, padded collar, and the wraparound neon green sole.
